input.request: My laptop won't turn on. I've tried holding the power button but nothing happens.
How do I submit my travel expenses from the conference last week?

metadata.notes: HR vs Finance confusion - expense reimbursement goes to HR

input.request: The projector in conference room B is broken - it won't display anything.

metadata.notes: IT vs Facilities - building equipment goes to Facilities

input.request: I need to expense my home office chair. What's the process?

metadata.notes: HR vs Finance confusion - employee reimbursement goes to HR

input.request: My badge doesn't work at the front door. I had to wait for someone to let me in.
Can you help me reset my password? I'm locked out of my account.
What's the policy on working from home on Fridays?
We need to pay this vendor invoice for the marketing materials. Invoice #12345.

metadata.notes: Clear Finance case - vendor payment (not employee reimbursement)

input.request: The AC in my area is freezing. Can someone adjust the temperature?
I got a suspicious email asking me to click a link and enter my password. Is this phishing?

metadata.notes: IT vs Security confusion - information security goes to IT

input.request: Thanks for your help last week! Really appreciated it.

metadata.notes: Edge case - not a helpdesk request
